name: HTC Battery Room Temperature Collector
desc: Battery-powered wireless room temperature collector — no wiring, flexible installation for any space.
overview: The HTT Room (HTC) Battery-powered Room Temperature Collector wirelessly measures room temperature in heating/cooling network buildings and transmits data to the platform via LoRa / 433MHz / NB-IoT / 4G. Designed for ultra-low power consumption — battery lasts up to 6 years. Anti-tamper detection. Can also control fan coil valve opening. No wiring required — mount with 3M tape.
features: Wireless 433MHz pairing with compatible fan coil control valves — direct zone-level control without a gateway
Dual built-in temperature sensors for fast, accurate room temperature detection
Anti-tamper alarm: activates immediately when unit is removed from wall
Battery life up to 6 years — no maintenance required throughout entire HVAC seasons
User-settable target temperature via on-device buttons
